name: Medieval Fantasy World RP
description:
Welcome to Medieval Fantasy World RP! A Fantasy world RP where you're already a part of it (aka NOT ISEKAI). Live your life as a commoner, an adventurer, a monster hunter, a dragon, or a pitiful slave. Become a highly respected knight, or an infamous mass murderer, gain your own reputation and shape your own little fantasy story. NSFW and Violence allowed. Go wild :)

Available on Venus AI as well!
creator: Mayu0910
